name: Hot Summer
description: A weeks-long regional heat event precedes the failure: source water is already stressed, the south-zone drop starts deeper, and the grid enters the crisis with less margin than the operators would like.

name: Strained Finances
description: The town enters the crisis one budget cycle after a failed override vote: the emergency fund is thinner, and an unresolved procurement grievance already sits on the legal record. The playbook that survives the baseline engagement is one mutual-aid activation too rich here.
